name: design-craft-skills
description: Two generative design-craft skills for building and polishing real interfaces — ui-designer (visual craft: spacing, color, typography, design tokens, component systems, pixel-perfect polish) and ux-designer (experience strategy: user flows, information architecture, interaction design, usability, the psychology behind decisions). Each ships progressive-disclosure reference files and auto-routes on its own triggers; the two hand off to each other (flow → visual). Generative, not diagnostic — these build and refine the interface. Pairs with design-loop-methodology, which critiques design surfaces read-only.
